site_description: Community portal for the City of Koronadal (unofficial)

hero.title: BetterKoronadal.org
hero.subtitle: An independent, community-built portal that makes information and services for the City of Koronadal easier to find. This is not the official city website.

services.title: Services & Information
services.description: Access Koronadal City services quickly and easily. Find what you need for health, business, education, social welfare, and more.

governmentActivity.title: Government Activity
governmentActivity.description: Stay updated with the latest news, announcements, and programs of the City Government of Koronadal.

footer.copyright: © 2026 BetterKoronadal.org — an independent community project. Not affiliated with the City Government of Koronadal.

joinUs.stripSubtitle: Help build the future of the Philippines and governance through technology
joinUs.bannerSubtitle: Help build the future of the Philippines and governance through technology.

forex.title: Peso Exchange Rates
forex.subtitle: Today's BSP reference rates — how much one peso (PHP) is worth against currencies common to Koronadal's OFW families.
forex.errorTitle: Exchange rates are unavailable right now
forex.ratesNote: Rates per 1 unit of foreign currency, in pesos.

procurements.seoDescription: Open government procurement opportunities (bid notices) for the City of Koronadal from PhilGEPS — the Philippine Government Electronic Procurement System.
procurements.seoKeywords: Koronadal procurement, bid notices, PhilGEPS, government bidding, tenders, South Cotabato
procurements.heading: Procurement Opportunities
procurements.introBefore: Open bid notices and procurement opportunities for the City of Koronadal, sourced from
procurements.introAfter: , the Philippine Government Electronic Procurement System.
procurements.disclaimer: PhilGEPS is the authoritative source — always confirm details and deadlines there before acting. This is an independent community portal, not the official city or PhilGEPS website.
procurements.emptyBody: No opportunities are cached right now. Search the live PhilGEPS opportunities listing for “Koronadal” to see current bid notices.

floodControl.seoDescription: DPWH flood-control infrastructure projects in the City of Koronadal, South Cotabato — with contractor, contract cost, and year, sourced from the DPWH Flood Control Projects dataset.
floodControl.seoKeywords: Koronadal flood control, DPWH projects, South Cotabato infrastructure, contractor, contract cost, flood mitigation
floodControl.heading: Flood Control Projects in Koronadal
floodControl.intro: Flood-control infrastructure projects in the City of Koronadal funded through the Department of Public Works and Highways (DPWH). Each card shows the awarded contractor, contract cost, and infrastructure year.
floodControl.sourceDisclaimer: . This is an independent community portal, not the official city or DPWH website.
floodControl.emptyBefore: No Koronadal flood-control projects are currently listed. Browse the full dataset on the
